description: Writes content to a file on on-premise storage via a BridgeApp controller

content.description: Content to write, or path expression

controllerId.description: Controller ID or path expression (TypeID with 'ctl' prefix)

createDirectories.description: Create parent directories if they don't exist (default: true)

path.description: Absolute file path on the controller's filesystem, or path expression

title: File Write Node Config
